overall.description: A nighttime exploration scene from Red Dead Redemption 2, showing a character walking along a rocky hillside and lakeshore under dark stormy skies. The footage features high-quality game engine graphics with cinematic lighting from moonlight breaking through clouds.

agents.ego_description: walking along rocky terrain toward a distant campfire visible on the left hillside

entered.detail: small orange glow from a fire in the distance on the hillside
uneven rocky ground with patches of grass forming a trail
sparse pine trees on the left side of the path
dark storm clouds covering most of the sky with stars visible in gaps
silhouetted mountain range on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark rocky hillside at night with a distant campfire glowing on the left. The character walks forward along the trail with scattered trees visible on the left side and mountains in the far distance under a cloudy night sky.

events.description: distant campfire passes out of view as the path continues along the ridge

agents.ego_description: continuing along the rocky path with trees on the left and a body of water becoming visible to the right

entered.detail: dark lake or river visible in the distance to the right

segments.scene_description: Moving along the rocky trail, the campfire disappears from view as the character approaches a body of water on the right. Trees line the left side of the path while the terrain remains rocky and uneven.

events.description: game UI prompt appears offering to pick and examine a plant

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge with the shoreline and rocks on the right side

entered.detail: large rocks and boulders along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the rocky shoreline with water lapping at the rocks on the right. The terrain opens up to reveal more of the lake and distant shore, while a game UI prompt briefly appears indicating an interactive plant can be collected.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark, rocky hillside that gradually opens up to a moonlit lakeshore. It begins on a rugged trail at night, moving forward past scattered trees and a distant, glowing campfire under a heavy canopy of clouds. As the character advances, the campfire fades from view and the terrain shifts, bringing a body of water into sight on the right. The scene then expands as the path merges into a rocky shoreline where water laps against the stones, revealing a wider view of the lake and the distant opposite shore. Finally, the camera continues along the water's edge, passing an interactive plant as the landscape opens fully to the night sky.
